full_text:
## This Week at a Glance

This week BMSS turned over $28,741 in revenue. Reported margin sits at 34.5%, and the true margin — after stripping out Bottlemart's promo credits — is 31.9%. That's 1.4 percentage points up versus last week. Bottlemart covered $755 in promotional discounts this week — that's chain-funded and doesn't come out of your pocket.

## What to Order

You have 273 items to order this week — 4 critical, 132 high priority, and 30 medium. Critical items are your profit-protected sellers that have dropped below half a week of cover: Victoria Bitter Bt 375ml 24pk, Jim Beam White & Cola Bt 330ml 24pk, Jim Beam White & Cola Bt 500ml 12pk and 1 more. Get these ordered today. High-priority items include Carlton Draught Can 375ml 24pk, Victoria Bitter Can 375ml, Carlton Draught Bt 375ml 24pk and 129 more — these are either out of stock or very close to it. The remaining 30 medium-priority items are within a week of running out. Order this week to avoid gaps on the shelf.

## Margin Health

There are 87 items selling below their target margin, representing $644 in weekly profit drag — roughly $33,509 left on the table per year if nothing changes. The most urgent: Somersby Pear Cider Can 375ml 30pk appear to have pricing errors — their shelf price may be set too low in the POS. Check and correct these first. Worth noting: Johnnie Walker Gold 750ml, Johnnie Walker Black 700ml and similar items are only profitable because Bottlemart is subsidising the margin. Without that chain support, you'd be selling them at a loss. Keep an eye on whether those promos continue.

## Pricing Opportunities

There are 7 items where a small price increase could add roughly $3,080 to annual profit at current volume. The lowest-risk opportunity is Coca Cola Bt 600ml 24pk — a $0.51 increase to $5.00 would add about $318 per year. Customers in this category rarely price-shop. There are 2 medium-risk candidates in categories like bourbon and wine where you could test a modest increase but watch volume closely.

## Sales Momentum

The strongest upward movers this week are Passion Pop Original 750Ml, De Bortoli Prem Shiraz Cabernet Cask 4L, Berri Estate Traditional Dry Red 5L. Make sure these are well-stocked to capture demand. Declining velocity on Beef Jerky Kho Bo 80G, Coopers Sparkling Ale Bt 375Ml 24Pk, Sovereign Pt Fruity White Cask 4.4L — worth checking whether it's seasonal, a competitor move, or simply less promotional support than usual.

## What's Gone Missing

There are 307 products that sold in 2025 but haven't appeared in any 2026 report yet, representing roughly $2,782/week in potentially recoverable revenue. The top picks to chase are Mercury Blackcurrant Cider Can 375ml, Wyndham Est Bin 999 Merlot 750ml, Kingfisher Extra Strong Can 500ml — these had the highest weekly revenue in 2025 and are worth contacting your rep about.
